iap_tiers.rationale: Entry tier anchored at market floor; covers ~1 continue use; impulse buy for casual spenders
Mid tier at industry median; matches Tile Match Sweet ad-block price and Zen Match Piggy Bank tier; covers 2-3 continues
High-value tier; most common committed-casual price across Lily's Garden, June's Journey, and Zen Match; 17% bonus over linear scaling
Whale entry tier; $9.99 is universal whale-entry price across all surveyed competitors; 30% bonus over $4.99 linear rate

app_store_metadata.description_en:
Glow Island is a healing tile-connect puzzle game where you match glowing tiles to restore a sleeping island back to life — no timers, no lives, no pressure, just pure satisfying rhythm.

• NO stamina, NO lives, NO countdown timers — play freely at your own pace, retry any level without penalty
• 180 hand-crafted puzzles across 6 chapters, each tied to a seasonal island zone that visually transforms as you progress
• 5 tactical special tiles (Wave, Light Chain, Pierce, Swap, Cascade) create satisfying combo moments and strategic depth
• Meet warm island residents — a seasoned fisherman, a pottery artisan, a nature guide, and a lighthouse keeper — through an unfolding healing story
• Zen Mode levels let you relax completely with no step limits — ideal for winding down after a long day

Glow Island is made for the moments when you need to breathe. Whether you have two minutes or two hours, the island is always there — calm, beautiful, and waiting. Connect tiles, feel the rhythm, and watch a forgotten island bloom again. For anyone who has ever wanted a game that truly keeps its promise of relaxation.
app_store_metadata.description_zh:
光辉岛是一款治愈系连连看手游——连接同色图块，积累光能，唤醒那座沉睡的小岛，让它重新发光。

• 无体力、无生命值、无倒计时——想玩就玩，失败无惩罚，随时重试，随时退出
• 6章×30关，共180个精心设计的关卡，每章对应一个岛屿区域，随进度动态焕新视觉
• 5种战术特殊图块（光波·光链·穿透·置换·连锁），制造爽快连击时刻与策略深度
• 遇见温暖的岛屿居民——老渔夫、陶艺工匠、自然向导、灯塔守——在无声叙事中感受温度
• 禅境模式关卡无步数限制，适合需要彻底放松的你

光辉岛，为那些需要喘口气的时刻而生。无论你有两分钟还是两小时，小岛永远在那里——安静、美好、等你。连接图块，感受节奏，看着一座被遗忘的小岛重新绽放。献给每一位真正需要放松的你。

screenshot_plan.visual_notes: Show active combo chain with glowing tile path, combo multiplier UI visible, warm beach-dock setting (Ch1 spring theme). Emphasize satisfying visual feedback.
Split-screen or before/after overlay: left side gray/desaturated island zone, right side fully restored vibrant version. Showcase the visual transformation payoff.
Show NPC interaction moment — e.g. old fisherman Isobe Kenzo on the dock or pottery artisan Kirishima Umeko in the town square. Warm, hand-drawn watercolor style.
Showcase a Light Chain or Wave special tile triggering — full-board glow cascade effect. Can show small UI labels for each special tile type. High visual impact moment.
Full island map view with partially or fully restored zones glowing warmly. Lighthouse lit. Conveys the meta-game emotional payoff and overall world. Lifestyle feel.

positioning_statement: 无倒计时、无体力限制，在光辉小岛上，用连线消除感受治愈节奏

gap_warnings_inherited.gap: Crash analytics / stability monitoring not yet integrated (Firebase Crashlytics or equivalent)
gap_warnings_inherited.competitor_example: All top competitors (Zen Match, Lily's Garden, June's Journey) treat crash-free launch as table stakes; even one crash wave tanks early App Store ratings

gap_warnings_inherited.gap: In-app rating prompt (SKStoreReviewRequestAPI) not confirmed implemented
gap_warnings_inherited.competitor_example: Merge Mansion (4.56★/182K ratings) and Triple Tile (4.86★/250K ratings) both use well-timed review prompts post positive moments; missing this at launch is leaving rating velocity on the table

gap_warnings_inherited.gap: No ad-removal IAP or subscription option (competitors like Flow Free, Tile Match Sweet offer $2.99 ad-block)
gap_warnings_inherited.competitor_example: Flow Free (ad-block $0.99–$2.99), Tile Match Sweet ($2.99 no-ads deal) — if Glow Island ever introduces rewarded ads, players expect a buy-out option

gap_warnings_inherited.gap: No daily challenge / streak mechanic for retention (Zen Match has daily tile explorer; Lily's Garden has daily quests)
gap_warnings_inherited.competitor_example: Zen Match Daily Tile Explorer, Lily's Garden daily events — drives D7/D30 retention significantly; absent in Glow Island spec
